SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Toggle the visibility of the side scrollbar in lists.
Show or hide the album art thumbnail in the song list.
Show or hide the track duration time on the right side of the queue.

EditTextPreference.app:summary: The main background color of the Media App.
The primary accent color for active tabs, selected items, and progress bars.
Controls generic system list item heights. Does NOT affect songs in the media app.
Controls the height of songs in the Now Playing Queue. Decrease to fit 7+ songs.
Controls the size of the album art on the main playback screen.
Controls album art size in grid views.
Controls album art size in list views.
Controls the height of songs in the Library/Browse view. Decrease to fit 7+ songs.

EditTextPreference.app:defaultValue: You can\u2019t use this feature while driving
Media isn\'t available for this list
